creator: yehorov@gmail.com
text:
DBIx::Safe is a Perl module that allows for safe and controlled access
to a DBI database handle. It is similar in spirit to the standard Perl
module "Safe". It is used by Bucardo to ensure that custom code
does not interfere with the normal running of Bucardo. a

WWW: http://bucardo.org/wiki/DBIx-Safe

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
